About
01
Who I am

I turn raw video
into actionable insight.

I'm a Computer Vision Engineer who builds systems that see, understand, and respond to the visual world in real time. My work spans the full pipeline — from dataset preparation and model fine-tuning to production APIs and live streaming dashboards.

Professional Journey

Work Experience

Computer Vision Engineer

Technology Innovation Hub, IIT Tirupati
March 2025 - Present
  • Designed and developed an automated face recognition attendance system using a YOLOv8 → InsightFace → AdaFace IR-101 pipeline, eliminating proxy attendance by replacing manual roll calls with camera-based identity verification across 72 registered individuals, achieving 97.71% accuracy on 22,218 evaluated samples.
  • Built a real-time Staff/Customer tracking system using YOLOv8 + ByteTrack on indoor camera feeds — tracking idle/active time, queue wait times, and breach alerts via a Flask + Socket.IO dashboard deployed on AWS EC2.
  • Developed a vehicle number plate recognition system using YOLOv8 and EasyOCR for real-time detection and OCR from CCTV footage, improving localization accuracy under variable lighting and weather conditions.
Selected work

Projects I've
shipped.

Vision Based Staff and Customer Tracking In Indoor Environments
● Complete
Real-time indoor staff/customer tracking system using YOLOv8 + custom StableTracker. Tracks idle/active time, queue wait times, and breach alerts. Deployed on AWS EC2 with Flask + Socket.IO dashboard. 95.34% mAP@0.5 on custom dataset.
Python YOLOv8 ByteTrack Flask SocketIO AWS EC2
View on GitHub ↗
AI Based Face Recognition Attendance System
● Complete
Automated Student attendance system combining YOLOv8 face detection with InsightFace and AdaFace IR-101. High-accuracy recognition across varied lighting, angles, and occlusions in a live classroom setting.
YOLOv8 InsightFace AdaFace IR-101 Python OpenCV
